title: Mystic Traveler
body:
# Mystic Traveler
### A pony magic kitchensink!

Featuring a vast number of magic and magic-adjacent mods, a variety of decor and prettification mods, and, of course, Unicopia and Mine Little Pony, this pack is full of magical vibes. Explore several arcane arts - and a few forms of engineering, if that's your fancy - all while playing as a pony.

It's also got a custom guidebook populated with all the information about what's included. You'll get a copy when you load into a world for the first time. (Disclaimer: currently does not contain all the info. But it will, eventually.)

It runs on Quilt 1.19.2.
